heading: Review in Supreme Court on certiorari or certification
label: 2350 Review in Supreme Court on certiorari or certification

children.label: a
children.text: An order granting or denying an interlocutory injunction under and a final judgment of the court of appeals in a proceeding to review under this chapter are subject to review by the Supreme Court on a writ of certiorari as provided by . Application for the writ shall be made within 45 days after entry of the order and within 90 days after entry of the judgment, as the case may be. The United States, the agency, or an aggrieved party may file a petition for a writ of certiorari.section 2349(b) of this titlesection 1254(1) of this title

children.label: b
children.text: The provisions of , regarding certification, and of , regarding stays, also apply to proceedings under this chapter.section 1254(2) of this titlesection 2101(f) of this title
